author: Al-Imam Abu Zakariya Yahya bin Sharaf An-Nawawi Ad-Dimashqi
_source_note: Provided directly by the site owner (June 2026) as the authoritative chapter list for normalization. Chapter numbers and titles transcribed verbatim from that source. This file is reference data only — not yet wired into any matching/normalization logic.
